title: Wemmbu music
description: This resources pack replace the default minecraft music with 4 of wemmbu background music inside the world, it works on servers
body:
Bring a whole new vibe to your Minecraft world with the iconic sounds of Wemmbu.

This resource pack replaces the in-game music with custom Wemmbu tracks, creating a fresh and immersive experience while exploring, mining, or just chilling in your world.
